Quick question about Russell Hendrix B2B orders: when a restaurant group or institutional buyer places a large equipment order, do payment terms and any deposit apply automatically at checkout, or is that handled through invoicing after the order?

In TermStack that runs as a rule at checkout: under $1k pay now, $1k to $10k Net 30, over $10k Net 60 with a 25% deposit. A US toy and gift wholesaler on Plus runs it today.
